title: Chinja password
subtitle: Gadzirisa kuchengetedza account yako
requirements: Inofanirwa kunge iine 8+ char, hombe, vadiki, nhamba, & yakakosha char

messages.invalid: Pasiwedhi rinofanirwa kunge riine mabhii asingaite 8, vara guru rimwe, vadiki rimwe chete, nhamba imwe chete nemavara akakosha
